codeReview.summary: README.md was comprehensively rewritten. All five validation requirements are met: (1) Installation section covers Rust toolchain (rustup), build command (cargo build --workspace), and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable setup. (2) Quickstart section documents daemon startup (cargo run --bin swell-daemon), task creation (swell task), and task watching (swell watch). (3) End-to-end workflow section demonstrates the full task lifecycle (creation → planning → approval → execution → validation → completion) with 13 CLI commands across 5 steps. (4) Crate Overview table lists all 12 workspace crates with detailed descriptions (swell-core, swell-orchestrator, swell-llm, swell-tools, swell-validation, swell-memory, swell-state, swell-sandbox, swell-skills, swell-daemon, swell-benchmark, swell-cli). (5) Troubleshooting section covers 5 common issues: connection refused (daemon not running), rustls-tls build failure (outdated Rust), API key not found, clippy warnings as errors, and test timeouts.
